final_prompt.prompt:
Create a Korean café-style photo of artisan coffee and dessert, shot on smartphone for Instagram, with hand-drawn annotations in Japanese journal style.

Style/medium: smartphone photography with the casual intimacy of a personal café moment, overlaid with white fine-line hand-drawn annotations in the spirit of rough magazine notes
Composition: overhead or 45-degree angle capturing coffee and dessert as the hero subjects, generous negative space for annotation breathing room, annotations scattered like whispered thoughts across the frame
Subject: single-origin pour-over coffee in a ceramic cup with visible steam wisps, layered dessert (tiramisu or basque cheesecake) on a minimalist ceramic plate, wooden table surface with soft natural texture
Scene/backdrop: Korean café interior with warm wood tones, soft natural window light, blurred background suggesting cozy seating area
Lighting/mood: the gentle warmth of afternoon light through café windows, a quiet pause in the day, the comfort of being alone with something delicious
Color palette: warm honey and cream tones with the deep brown of coffee, soft beige ceramics, the quiet restraint of Korean minimalism
Materials/textures: matte ceramic glaze, porous wood grain, the silken surface of coffee crema, the moist crumb of cake
Text (verbatim): 
  コーヒー → 「まろやか〜」
  ケーキ → 「しっとり最高」
  空間 → 「癒しの時間」
  全体 → 「幸せすぎる〜」
  （蒸汽线描・キラキラ・小さなハート・ちいさな顔文字）
Constraints: no people in frame, white fine-line hand-drawn style only, Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji), short diary-like comments, arrows and dotted lines for visual guidance, moderate decorative elements (steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoticons) with intentional留白
Avoid: heavy annotations covering the food, perfect geometric lines, English text, overcrowding the frame, professional studio lighting look
